revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:12 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:12月27日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 12월 27일]][[zh-min-nan:12 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十二月廿七]][[zh:十二月廿七]]
{{Not to be confused with|December 27|qq=December 27}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十二月廿七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 12월 27일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar December|qq=}} '''December 27''' is the 27th day of the month {{ill|Layue|en|Layue|qid=Q905470|lt=December (Shiwasu)|1=Layue}}, the 12th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}. == Events == * {{ill|Engi (era)|en|Engi (era)|qid=Q1374325|lt=Engi|1=Engi (era)}} 20th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|921|en|921|qid=Q30102|lt=921|1=921}} {{ill|February 7|en|February 7|qid=Q2322|lt=February 7|1=February 7}}) – The imperial prince, {{ill|Gao Ming Shinnō|ja|高明親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gao Ming Shinnō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} of {{ill|Emperor Daigo|en|Emperor Daigo|qid=Q329753|lt=Emperor Daigo|1=Emperor Daigo}}, was demoted to commoner status and granted the surname Minamoto, marking the beginning of the {{ill|Daigo Genji|ja|醍醐源氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daigo Genji|1=Daigo Genji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q3700882}}. * {{ill|Kenkyū|en|Kenkyū|qid=Q1193933|lt=Kenkyū|1=Kenkyū}} 9th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1199|en|1199|qid=Q19752|lt=1199|1=1199}} {{ill|January 25|en|January 25|qid=Q2279|lt=January 25|1=January 25}}) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|en|Minamoto no Yoritomo|qid=Q242800|lt=Minamoto no Yoritomo|1=Minamoto no Yoritomo}} fell from his horse. This incident precipitated his death on {{ill|January 13 (Lunisolar)|ja|旧暦1月13日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/January 13 (Lunisolar)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1月13日 (旧暦)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1月13日 (旧暦)}} the following year. * {{ill|Kōan (Muromachi period)|en|Kōan (Muromachi period)|qid=Q515424|lt=Kōan (Kamakura period)|1=Kōan (Muromachi period)}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1280|en|1280|qid=Q5536|lt=1280|1=1280}} {{ill|January 30|en|January 30|qid=Q2287|lt=January 30|1=January 30}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara Tameuji|ja|藤原為氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Tameuji|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 二条為氏|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 二条為氏|1=Nijō Tameuji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10880237}} compiled the {{ill|Shokushūi Wakashū|en|Shokushūi Wakashū|qid=Q1143282|lt=Zoku Shūi Wakashū|1=Shokushūi Wakashū}}. == Births == * {{ill|正德|en|正德|qid=Q11123425|lt=Shōtoku|1=正德}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1716|en|1716|qid=Q6892|lt=1716|1=1716}} {{ill|January 21|en|January 21|qid=Q2273|lt=January 21|1=January 21}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Munetake|en|Tokugawa Munetake|qid=Q2439046|lt=Tokugawa Sōbu|1=Tokugawa Munetake}}, the second son of {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshimune|en|Tokugawa Yoshimune|qid=Q319664|lt=Tokugawa Yoshimune|1=Tokugawa Yoshimune}} and the first head of the {{ill|Tadayasu-ke|ja|田安家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tadayasu-ke|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 田安徳川家|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 田安徳川家|1=Tayasu House|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11576489}} (died {{ill|1771|en|1771|qid=Q7686|lt=1771|1=1771}}). * {{ill|Hōreki|en|Hōreki|qid=Q1194397|lt=Hōreki|1=Hōreki}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1756|en|1756|qid=Q7632|lt=1756|1=1756}} {{ill|January 28|en|January 28|qid=Q2285|lt=January 28|1=January 28}}) – {{ill|Udagawa Genzui|ja|宇田川玄随|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Udagawa Genzui|1=Udagawa Genzui|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6530604}}, a medical scholar and Rangaku specialist (died {{ill|1798|en|1798|qid=Q7823|lt=1798|1=1798}}). * {{ill|Hōreki|en|Hōreki|qid=Q1194397|lt=Hōreki|1=Hōreki}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1759|en|1759|qid=Q7643|lt=1759|1=1759}} {{ill|January 25|en|January 25|qid=Q2279|lt=January 25|1=January 25}}) – {{ill|Matsudaira Sadanobu|en|Matsudaira Sadanobu|qid=Q284038|lt=Matsudaira Sadashin|1=Matsudaira Sadanobu}}, a Rōjū of the {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|徳川幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸幕府|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸幕府}} (died {{ill|1829|en|1829|qid=Q7572|lt=1829|1=1829}}). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1193910}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1781|en|1781|qid=Q7719|lt=1781|1=1781}} {{ill|January 21|en|January 21|qid=Q2273|lt=January 21|1=January 21}}) – {{ill|Rai San'yō|en|Rai San'yō|qid=Q153320|lt=Rai San'yō|1=Rai San'yō}}, a Chinese studies scholar (died {{ill|1832|en|1832|qid=Q7584|lt=1832|1=1832}}). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|January 21|en|January 21|qid=Q2273|lt=January 21|1=January 21}}) – {{ill|Suzuki Saburōsuke|ja|鈴木三郎助|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suzuki Saburōsuke|1=Saburōsuke Suzuki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11648507}}, president of the Suzuki Trading Company (the predecessor of {{ill|Ajinomoto|en|Ajinomoto|qid=Q412826|lt=Ajinomoto|1=Ajinomoto}}) (died {{ill|1931|en|1931|qid=Q18782|lt=1931|1=1931}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Kōhō|en|Kōhō|qid=Q1327182|lt=Kōhō|1=Kōhō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|967|en|967|qid=Q23699|lt=967|1=967}} {{ill|February 9|en|February 9|qid=Q2324|lt=February 9|1=February 9}}) – {{ill|Ono no Michikaze|en|Ono no Michikaze|qid=Q1439775|lt=Ono no Michikaze|1=Ono no Michikaze}}, a renowned calligrapher (born {{ill|894|en|894|qid=Q30577|lt=894|1=894}}). * {{ill|Heiji|en|Heiji|qid=Q1193930|lt=Heiji|1=Heiji}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1160|en|1160|qid=Q19662|lt=1160|1=1160}} {{ill|February 6|en|February 6|qid=Q2320|lt=February 6|1=February 6}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Nobuyori|en|Fujiwara no Nobuyori|qid=Q2918443|lt=Fujiwara Nobunori|1=Fujiwara no Nobuyori}}, a kugyō (court noble) (born {{ill|1133|en|1133|qid=Q19586|lt=1133|1=1133}}). * {{ill|Kyōtoku|en|Kyōtoku|qid=Q1143370|lt=Kyōtoku|1=Kyōtoku}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1455|en|1455|qid=Q6480|lt=1455|1=1455}} {{ill|January 15|en|January 15|qid=Q2260|lt=January 15|1=January 15}}) – {{ill|Uesugi Noriakira|ja|上杉憲忠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uesugi Noriakira|1=Uesugi Noritada|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11359174}}, a military commander (born {{ill|1433|en|1433|qid=Q6356|lt=1433|1=1433}}). * {{ill|Civilization|en|Civilization|qid=Q8432|lt=Bunmei|1=Civilization}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1471|en|1471|qid=Q6577|lt=1471|1=1471}} {{ill|January 18|en|January 18|qid=Q2265|lt=January 18|1=January 18}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Hanazono|en|Emperor Go-Hanazono|qid=Q451926|lt=Go-Kazan Tennō|1=Emperor Go-Hanazono}}, the 102nd Emperor of Japan (born {{ill|1419|en|1419|qid=Q6205|lt=1419|1=1419}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|12|26|12|28|11|27|1|12|1227|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
